meta.description: Land cover map for 2021 with statistics by NUTS.  Click on the "Statistics" tab and then select a geographic area of interest.

Detailed land cover and land use information for 55 thematic classes in selected Natura2000 sites for the 2018 reference year. The dataset has a Minimum Mapping Unit (MMU) of 0.5 ha and a Minimum Mapping Width (MMW) of 10 m and is available as vector data.
Land cover map for 2021 with statistics using Natura 2000 boundaries.  Zoom in until the scale bar shows 10km to show Natura boundaries then click on a Natura area to view statisics.
Above ground biomass (AGB) in t/ha in 20 m spatial resolution created with the BIOMASAR method using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
Soil Organic Carbon content in the 0-20 cm top soil expressed in g kg-1 for 100 m resolution pixels (2020-2022) with statistics using NUTS 2024 boundaries.
Below ground biomass (BGB) in t/ha in 20 m spatial resolution created with the BIOMASAR method using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.

Trends in land cover between 2018 and 2023 are evaluated based on an automated algorithm to map land cover dynamics at 10 m resolution that combines deep learning and a pixel classifier on pre-processed Sentinel-2 imagery and ancillary input layers.

sources.name: Trends in Productivity - Values of Trend Coefficient

meta.description: Values of trend coefficient of productivity over the period 2018-2023 (day / year) between -10 and +10.  (Scale needs to be offset by 1/10 - 10)
Using above-ground biomass (AGB) changes as a proxy for carbon stock changes to provide an estimate independent of trends (between 2010 and 2018) in land cover and trends in land productivity.

meta.description: Satellite-derived vegetation index (NDVI) from Sentinel-2. Indicates vegetation density and photosynthetic activity. Time series available.

Satellite-derived Fraction of Absorbed Photosynthetically Active Radiation (FAPAR) from Sentinel-2.
Indicates vegetation photosynthetic activity and plant productivity.
Time series available.
Satellite-derived Leaf Area Index (LAI) from Sentinel-2. Indicates density of vegetation canopy. Time series available.
Satellite-derived Fraction of Green Vegetaion Cover (FCOVER) from Sentinel-2. Indicates fraction of ground covered by green vegetation.
